G 18 RegistryOIML Term-Usage Registry
TermsTC / SCPublicationsEditionsHarmoniseID ConflictsDivergence
Registry / Terms / verification of a measuring instrument

verification of a measuring instrument

VIMLOutdated — VIML 2000 G 18 #00166 · 15 instances

Authoritative definition

VIML 2000 · concept #2.13view ↗

procedure (other than type approval) which includes the examination and marking and/or issuing of a verification certificate, that ascertains and confirms that the measuring instrument complies with the statutory requirements

Outdated: Cites VIML 2000. Latest: VIML 2022.
  • VIML 2000 · #2.13
    procedure (other than type approval) which includes the examination and marking and/or issuing of a verification certificate, that ascertains and confirms that the measuring instrument complies with the statutory requirements

Suggested actions

  1. INFO ✓ This term IS in VIML 2022 (concept #2.09). Definition may differ from VIML 2000.
  2. MEDIUM 13 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 6 partially diverge.

procedure (other than type approval) which includes the examination and marking and/or issuing of a verification certificate, that ascertains and confirms that the measuring instrument complies with the statutory requirements [VIML, 2.13]

procedure other than type approval which includes the examination and marking of a measuring instrument and/or issuing of a verification certificate, that establishes and confirm that the measuring instrument complies with the statutory requirements
